facts.statementZh: World Bank China industry value added growth 最近可用年度观测为 5.31944（2024），较上一可用年度变化为 0.95。该事实只能作为年度宏观背景和长周期需求代理，不能证明 1-3 个月国内有色供需、库存或公司盈利。
facts.transform: latest annual indicator value and previous-period change from World Bank public API
facts.interpretationHint: 可支持宏观背景、需求代理和周期语境；不可支持短周期国内供需强结论。
facts.scoreCapPolicy: World Bank annual macro facts can support background only and cap short-horizon supply-demand claims.
policyNotes: World Bank indicators are generally annual or lagged and cannot prove 1-3 month domestic nonferrous supply-demand by themselves.
World Bank macro data can support background context and score caps, not company earnings confirmation.
